---
title-block: false
format: revealjs
---

<div style="text-align:center;">

## Communicating Nonlinear Dynamics Across Boundaries via Interactive Simulations

**Andrew Krause (@Blindmath)**

<img src="images/DurUni.png" alt="Durham University logo" style="max-width:280px; width:45%; height:auto; margin:1rem 0;" />

*To navigate: press → and ← or swipe left and right on mobile.*

</div>

---

## Join this presentation

::: columns

:::

::: column
![](images/presentation_qr.png){fig-alt="andrewlkrause.github.io" width="75%"}

**andrewlkrause.github.io**
:::

::: column
![](images/qr-code.png){fig-alt="VisualPDE.com" width="75%"}

**VisualPDE.com**

:::

<div style="text-align:center;">
*To navigate: press → and ← or swipe left and right on mobile.*
</div>

---

## VisualPDE Example

::: {.slide-panel}

### Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion system

::: {.equations}
$$
\begin{aligned}
\frac{\partial u}{\partial t} &= D_u\nabla^2 u + f(u, v) = \nabla^2 u + u^2 v - (a+b) u , \\
\frac{\partial v}{\partial t} &= D_v \nabla^2 v + g(u, v) = 2 \nabla^2 v-u^2 v + a (1 - v)
\end{aligned}
$$
:::

::: {.iframe-panel}
<iframe title="VisualPDE simulation" class="visualpde-embed" src="https://visualpde.com/sim?-YHwBFg46BY6QUGQwgAKJ+f53XayJhEBOOgBywWikDBYFCkRc6IeUrA4vDspA8RcxgiaDD0rrDabLYAgo24LkwtawR3m2hvnAJRLQuLZOZsMOW-rDUQZM9FEw7fXGyP0Qa1MDIBw51uW+iXJaimp4i3rVQj520Oi-PESzdfZBZLfN-" frameborder="0"></iframe>
:::

:::

---

## Slide 3

> More to add...

---
